content: TASK-052 checkpoint done under TASK-010: public release path is verified. Sanitized GitHub repo is https://github.com/ai-org-labs/archmap, GitHub Pages viewer is live at https://ai-org-labs.github.io/archmap/, and @archmap/core@0.1.0 is published. npm access/status/dist-tag confirmed package record public/latest 0.1.0; npm pack @archmap/core@0.1.0 downloaded the published tarball. jsDelivr initially served cached 404s from pre-publication probes, then purge succeeded and both dist/archmap.js and dist/views3d/three-view.js returned HTTP 200; unpkg archmap.js also returned HTTP 200. Next release follow-up: consider tagging v0.1.0 on the sanitized public repo, add a short release note, and decide final wording for spec-level zone base view vs product UI zone overlay. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
